film.title: Breakthrough
film.overview: Tragedy strikes when a woman named Joyce's son falls through the ice on a frozen lake and is trapped underwater for over 15 minutes. After being rushed to the hospital, the 14-year-old boy continues to fight for his life as Joyce, her husband and their pastor stay by his bedside and pray for a miracle.

dialogues.dialogue: Okay!  Hey, babe!  You'll be proud of me. I'm jogging off that--  John Smith fell through a frozen lake!  Wait, what?
I can't wait to see you  shoot those baskets and run up and down the court again.  You are my pride and joy, John.  Do you hear your mother?  And I love you to the moon.
I am a broken,  desperate,  woman full of pride.  But I get it.  I have to let him go.
